questions.question: When and where was Elon Musk born?
questions.explanation: Elon Reeve Musk was born on June 28, 1971, in Pretoria, South Africa.

questions.question: Which of the following citizenships did Elon Musk acquire in 2002?
questions.explanation: Musk became an American citizen in 2002. He held South African and Canadian citizenship from birth.

questions.question: What was one of the software companies Elon Musk co-founded before X.com (which later merged to form PayPal)?
questions.explanation: In 1995, Musk co-founded the software company Zip2. Following its sale in 1999, he co-founded X.com.

questions.question: In what year did Elon Musk found the space technology company SpaceX?
questions.explanation: In 2002, Musk founded the space technology company SpaceX.

questions.question: When did Elon Musk become the CEO and product architect of Tesla?
questions.explanation: Musk joined the automaker Tesla as an early investor in 2004 and became its CEO and product architect in 2008.

questions.question: Which company did Elon Musk co-found in 2015 to advance artificial intelligence (AI) research, but later left?
questions.explanation: In 2015, he co-founded OpenAI to advance artificial intelligence (AI) research, but later left.

questions.question: According to Forbes' February 2026 estimate, what was Elon Musk's net worth?
questions.explanation: As of February 2026, Forbes estimates his net worth to be around US$852 billion.

questions.question: What significant role did Elon Musk serve in the Trump administration after the 2024 U.S. presidential election?
options: Senior Advisor to the President and de facto head of the Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE)
Head of the Space Exploration Council
questions.explanation: After Trump was inaugurated as president in early 2025, Musk served as Senior Advisor to the President and as the de facto head of the Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE).

questions.question: What was the name of the BASIC-based game Elon Musk sold at age twelve?
questions.explanation: At age twelve, Elon sold his BASIC-based game Blastar to PC and Office Technology magazine for approximately $500.

questions.question: Which social network did Elon Musk acquire in 2022 and subsequently rebrand as X?
questions.explanation: In 2022, he acquired the social network Twitter, implementing significant changes, and rebranding it as X in 2023.
